articles.title: England need tough guys to match the tough talk if they are to topple South Africa

articles.title: Lionel Messi makes his Miami homecoming with Argentina: ‘For us this is a chance to celebrate him’

articles.title: How many more Lyhannas must there be before France takes child sexual assault seriously?
articles.description: The outrage following the 11-year-old girl’s killing is justified. But the case reveals a deeper systemic neglect of child protection, says Guardian Europe columnist Rokhaya Diallo

more.title: PSL announces nominees for 2025/2026 season awards
more.description: The Premier Soccer League (PSL) has officially announced the nominees for the 2025/26 PSL Awards, with the winners set to be crowned at the awards ceremony on 27 July. The event will be broadcast live on the SuperSport PSL Channel and SABC Sport. Orlando Pirates duo of Oswin Appollis and Relebohile Mofokeng will be among […]

more.title: 5 life moments when South Africans wish they’d planned their forex sooner
more.description: Most South Africans only think about foreign exchange when a life event forces them to. A university acceptance letter arrives, a decision to emigrate becomes real, a property deal moves faster than expected. Suddenly, moving money across borders stops being abstract and becomes urgent. The problem is that urgency is expensive. Exchange rates shift daily, [...]

more.title: ARENA SPORTS SHOW | Lucas Radebe hails Mbokazi as ‘fearless’ defensive talent
more.description: Lucas Radebe lauds Mbekezeli Mbokazi's bravery and potential as a top South African player

more.title: Proteas Women Fall Short in Women’s T20 World Cup: Rasibe Ntozakhe Analyzes Semi-Final Defeat
more.description: LONDON — The Proteas Women fell short of reaching a third consecutive final at the Women’s T20 World Cup after suffering a 40-run semi-final defeat to tournament hosts England at the Oval. As England prepares to face arch-rivals Australia—who both boast perfect six-match winning records—in Sunday’s final at Lord’s, Lions off-spinner Rasibe Ntozakhe has provided [...]

more.title: Fans urged to stop sharing pirated copies of ‘The Polygamist’
more.description: The huge success of 'The Polygamist' on Netflix has introduced thousands of people to author Sue Nyathi’s bestselling novel, but copyright campaigners say many readers are finding the book through illegally shared PDF copies instead of buying it.

more.title: Junior Boks too strong for Georgia after early arm wrestle
more.description: The Junior Boks overcame a physical Georgia side to claim a 33-5 victory and extend their winning streak at the World Rugby U20 Championship.

more.title: FUSA Wins Outstanding Payments Case Against PSL Club
more.description: FUSA has confirmed that former Kruger United players have received outstanding payments following a successful PSL Dispute Resolution Chamber ruling, with more cases still pending.

more.title: Sports betting can become a trap, warns personal finance expert
more.description: Major sporting events are driving a surge in sports betting, but personal finance expert Laura du Preez warns that chasing quick wins can lead to debt, financial stress and repeated losses.

more.title: Bafana shift focus to 2027 Africa Cup of Nations
more.description: Captain Ronwen Williams says next year's AFCON is their next mission.

more.title: SANDF Deployed to Clermont as Wave of Lootings Rocks Durban Amid Immigration Protests
more.description: CLERMONT, KwaZulu-Natal — The South African National Defence Force has been deployed to KwaDabeka in Clermont, west of Durban, following a devastating wave of business lootings that struck overnight amid ongoing nationwide protests targeting undocumented immigrants. The unrest has left local business owners reeling after two supermarkets and a dental practice within a shopping centre [...]

more.title: The Springboks owe Ellis Park a statement performance against England
more.description: The world champions have named arguably their strongest possible matchday 23 for Saturday’s Test against England, leaving little excuse for anything other than a convincing victory at Ellis Park.

more.title: Migration committee to visit Beitbridge border to assess repatriation process
more.description: About 10,000 Malawian nationals have been camped in Musina for the past three days while awaiting documentation from the department to enable them to cross the border.
